posts.text: The internet is an amazing platform for astronomers & research. This week's #dotastro illuminates the possibilities hvrd.me/1623t7I
posts.author: @Harvard

posts.text: 4:30am alarm. On my way to my first #dotastro conference!
posts.author: @AlexVianaPro

posts.text: Schedule, speakers and talks for #dotastro 5 are up at dotastronomy.com/events/five/
posts.author: @dotastronomy

posts.text: Follow along with the tweets from @dotastronomy using #dotastro (there are usually lots of them!)
posts.author: @dotastronomy

posts.text: Now LHR to IAD to BOS for #dotastro and more jetlag. Gotta keep that body on its toes #whereintheworldissarah
posts.author: @PlanetDr

posts.text: So #dotastro will soon be kicking off. Those of us who can't make it will have to resort to following on Twitter, with #hashtagastro...
posts.author: @chrisenorth

posts.text: would rather be snoozing in bed, but seeing Oxford in this beautiful dawn light on my way to #dotastro is not so bad either.
posts.author: @sarahkendrew

posts.text: ooh, jealous of everyone heading to #dotastro! I'll be following along remotely :P
posts.author: @tomr_stargazer

posts.text: Have arrived in Cambridge, MA and am excited about #dotastro, the only conference where tweeting is almost a requirement! :)
posts.author: @astrofrog

posts.text: Just submitted an observing proposal that's due about 23 hours from now; so nothing shall stand in the way of #dotastro focus. #maybesleep
posts.author: @vrooje

posts.text: @dotastronomy packing my clothes, shoes and ENTHUSIASM for Monday's start. See you all soon! #dotastro #scienceftw
posts.author: @reneehlozek

posts.text: .@astropixie "playful naughtiness" sounds a lot more fun, though :-) #dotastro
posts.author: @JLGalache

posts.text: I hope all those going to #dotastro have a great time.
posts.author: @astronomyblog

posts.text: Are we (@carolune and me) the earliest to depart for #dotastro @dotastronomy?
posts.author: @govender

posts.text: Getting excited as the #dotastro chatter picks up! (And I hope @mpoessel's son feels better soon.)
posts.author: @vrooje

posts.text: omg @nialldeacon @RuthAngus just ROCKED the #dotastro hack day
posts.author: @davidwhogg

highlights: Harvard University tweeting about the event: "The internet is an amazing platform for astronomers & research"
Robert Simpson kicking things off: "Heading off to #dotastro 5!"
Thomas Robitaille: "the only conference where tweeting is almost a requirement!"
David W. Hogg on the hack day: "omg @nialldeacon @RuthAngus just ROCKED the #dotastro hack day"
Brooke Simmons live-blogged all three days of the conference
notes: 16 tweets recovered from the Storify archive via Wayback Machine. The Storify page was the only one from the series that was archived. Full liveblogs by Brooke Simmons, Carolina Odman, and Sarah Kendrew were also recovered from Wayback Machine at dotastronomy.com.
